name: BB:UBA : Add Mailbox Permission Succeeded
notes: Detects the successful mailbox permission added event.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Add Mailbox Permission Succeeded on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365
when the event QID is one of the following (101250200) Add MailboxPermission Succeeded
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : Add Mailbox Permission Succeeded on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
